Why ScheduleMe

Everything you need,
nothing you don't.

Built for the moment you need help fast — and for the businesses that show up.

  • AI Triage

    Describe your issue in plain language. Our AI understands context and urgency, categorizing your request instantly.

  • Instant Matching

    Get matched with vetted local pros in your area based on service type, availability, and rating.

  • One-Click Booking

    See real availability and book directly — no phone tag, no back-and-forth emails.

  • Verified Providers

    Every professional is background-checked, licensed, and reviewed by real customers.

Real stories

People love ScheduleMe

  • ★★★★★
    “Described a leaking pipe, got three plumbers within 2 minutes. Booked in 45 seconds. Incredible.”
    M

    Maria L.

    Austin, TX · Plumbing

  • ★★★★★
    “My AC died on the hottest day of summer. ScheduleMe found me an emergency tech in under a minute.”
    J

    James T.

    Phoenix, AZ · HVAC

  • ★★★★★
    “Finally a booking tool that doesn't make me call five places. I just typed what I needed.”
    S

    Sandra K.

    Denver, CO · Home Repair

How It Works

From problem to pro
in under 60 seconds.

  1. 1

    Describe Your Issue

    Type what's wrong in plain English — as if texting a friend.

  2. 2

    AI Triage

    Our AI identifies the service type, urgency, and what to expect.

  3. 3

    Pick Your Pro

    Browse matched providers and book the one that fits your schedule.
